sections.name: Hero Section
sections.purpose: A high-impact banner or slider that immediately captures visitor attention and conveys the brand's essence.

sections.name: Review Section
sections.purpose: Displays testimonials and positive feedback from satisfied clients to build trust and credibility.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.purpose: Highlights the unique value propositions, benefits, and differentiators that make the company stand out.

sections.name: Curated Spaces
sections.purpose: Showcases a selection of our best work or design styles through compelling imagery and brief descriptions.

sections.name: Common Questions
sections.purpose: Addresses frequently asked questions to provide immediate answers and reduce customer inquiries.

sections.name: Call to Action
sections.purpose: A prominent section encouraging visitors to take a specific next step, such as scheduling a consultation or requesting a quote.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.purpose: A brief overview of the company's mission, vision, and core values.

sections.name: Our Story
sections.purpose: Details the journey, history, and founding principles of the business.

sections.name: Meet the Team
sections.purpose: Introduces key team members, highlighting their expertise and roles within the company.

sections.name: Our Philosophy
sections.purpose: Explains the fundamental beliefs and approach to design and client service.

sections.name: Accreditations & Awards
sections.purpose: Showcases any professional certifications, industry recognitions, or awards received.

sections.name: Services Overview
sections.purpose: An introduction to the comprehensive range of design and architecture services offered.

sections.name: Service Package Section
sections.purpose: Presents various bundled service tiers or specific offerings with clear pricing or scope details.

sections.name: Residential Design
sections.purpose: Details services tailored for homes, including interior design, renovation, and new builds.

sections.name: Commercial Design
sections.purpose: Outlines services for businesses, such as office layouts, retail spaces, and hospitality design.

sections.name: Consultation & Planning
sections.purpose: Describes initial consultation services, feasibility studies, and project planning assistance.

sections.name: Our Process
sections.purpose: Explains the step-by-step journey clients can expect from project initiation to completion.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.purpose: Provides a user-friendly form for visitors to submit inquiries directly to the team.

sections.name: Contact Information
sections.purpose: Lists essential contact details such as phone number, email address, and physical location.

sections.name: Location Map
sections.purpose: Embeds an interactive map to help clients easily find the business's physical address.

sections.name: Business Hours
sections.purpose: Specifies the operating hours for client communication and appointments.

sections.name: Social Media Links
sections.purpose: Provides direct links to the company's social media profiles for broader engagement.
